_note: JSON sidecar for migration-manifest.yaml. The wizard runtime CLI consumes JSON; YAML is the human-facing companion. Both files MUST stay in sync.

artifact_notes.docs/voice_and_style.md: New operator output quality spec rendered from interview elicitation; defines tone, technical level, explanation depth, length preference, list and table style for all system outputs.
artifact_notes.test_cases.md: Expanded with operator output quality test cases (voice/style/rendering conformance).
artifact_notes.project_instructions.md: Operator output quality parameters wired in from interview; agents reference the voice_and_style spec.
artifact_notes.agents/prompts/orchestrator_prompt.md: Instructs orchestrator to apply the operator output quality spec from voice_and_style.md.
artifact_notes.agents/prompts/coordinator_prompt.md: Instructs coordinator to apply the operator output quality spec from voice_and_style.md.
artifact_notes.deliverables/README.md: New deliverables directory index; describes operator output location naming conventions established at interview.
artifact_notes.docs/how_your_system_works.md: Updated to cover the new design-outbound-message pass that runs before significant outgoing messages, and the deliverables/ output directory convention.
artifact_notes.wizard/skills/design-outbound-message.md: New skill that runs a design pass on any significant outbound message (email, digest, external audience) — reads voice_and_style.md, checks channel rendering and message organization, and returns the message ready to send.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the update check (it reports what's new + the recommendation). 2. On the operator's yes, the assistant applies it ("${WIZARD_HOME:-$HOME/agent-wizard}/scripts/wizard" self-upgrade --to v0.7.0 --apply). 3. A backup is taken first; the operator's own data, rules, credentials, and logs are never touched.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.9 (or any version in the supported range). A backup is taken automatically.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.7.0/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.9.
migrations.notes: Minor-additive release to v0.7.0: adds operator output quality specification (voice_and_style interview + deliverables/README.md), expands test_cases with output quality assertions, and updates project_instructions and agent prompts to reference the quality spec. No breaking changes; all prior operator project files remain valid.

No breaking changes; all prior operator project files remain valid. Combined jump from v0.6.8 straight to v0.7.0: also delivers every operating-layer change between v0.6.8 and v0.7.0.
